execution_details.stdout:
#!/bin/bash
# Apply sticky bit to world-writable directories on local filesystems
df --local -P | awk 'NR>1 {print $6}' | while read -r mount; do
    case $mount in
        /proc|/sys|/dev|/run|/tmp) continue 2;;
    esac
    find $mount -xdev -type d -perm -0002 -exec chmod a+t {} +
done
